footnotes.foot-1: Virgil is referring to the Emperor Augustus.
footnotes.foot-2: This signifies the dark forest of sin, confusion, and political turmoil.

text: Nel mezzo del cammin di nostra vita
mi ritrovai per una selva oscura,
ché la diritta via era smarrita.
longfellow: Midway upon the journey of our life
I found myself within a forest dark,
For the straightforward pathway had been lost.
modern: Halfway through the journey of our life
I woke up to find myself in a dark wood,
because the right path had been completely lost.

text: Ahi quanto a dir qual era è cosa dura
esta selva selvaggia e aspra e forte
che nel pensier rinova la paura!
longfellow: Ah me! how hard a thing it is to say
What was this forest savage, rough, and stern,
Which in the very thought renews the fear.
modern: Ah, how hard it is to describe it:
this savage, wild, and harsh forest,
just the thought of it brings back the fear!
